crime.value: Double murder of mother and young daughter, found bleeding on street
crime.quote: there lieing on the cold hard tarmack floor was my mum and my little sistor edith both of them covered in blood

victim.value: Mother and young daughter Edith, ostracized by extended family on both sides
victim.quote: the rest of the faimly didnt want anything to do with us because they were apaled that my dad had married my mum

investigator.value: Ellen, the surviving 16-year-old daughter seeking vengeance
investigator.quote: who ever it was that killed my mum and sistor edith was going to die them selfs

red_herring.value: Ellen Jackson as perpetrator misdirection - opening suggests she's the killer before revealing she's the victim's daughter
red_herring.quote: Ellen Jackson killer on the run you wont get away

social_world.value: Dysfunctional extended family dynamics with class prejudices and military-civilian tensions
social_world.quote: the rest of the faimly didnt want anything to do with us because they were apaled that my dad had married my mum

investigator_wound.value: Narrator is the victim's daughter seeking revenge, making her both investigator and emotionally compromised
investigator_wound.quote: who ever it was that killed my mum and sistor edith was going to die them selfs

_meta.title: ebook ellen jackson killer on the run
